ender_chest_end.title: Place an Ender Chest in your End base — link it to your Overworld Ender Chest for cross-dimensional supply

ender_chest_supply.title: Use the Ender Chest network to resupply mid-expedition without returning to the Overworld

subtitle.text: The Ender Chest is the most underrated logistic item in the game. One in the End. One at home. Infinite supply.

description: CH.14 · ENDER CHEST NETWORK
▸ The Ender Chest is a cross-dimensional personal inventory.
Every Ender Chest in the world shares the same contents.
One chest placed in the End, one at your Overworld base:
you can retrieve anything from home without leaving the End.
This is the core logistics solution for deep End expeditions.
◈ ENDER CHEST CRAFTING
└ Recipe: 8 Obsidian + 1 Eye of Ender (center)
└ Eye of Ender = Ender Pearl + Blaze Powder (1:1 craft)
└ Silk Touch pickaxe: recovers the Ender Chest on break
(without Silk Touch it drops 8 Obsidian — chest is lost)
└ Always carry a Silk Touch pickaxe when moving Ender Chests
◈ NETWORK SETUP
└ Place Ender Chest 1: Overworld base — load with resupply items
(Dragon Breath stock, Firework Rockets, potions, food, pearls)
└ Place Ender Chest 2: End base — retrieve as needed
└ Shulker Box trick: put a labeled Shulker Box in the Ender Chest
containing a pre-packed loadout for each activity
(combat kit, farming kit, building kit — each in its own box)
└ Capacity: 27 slots × however many Shulker Boxes you pack
= functionally unlimited cross-dimensional inventory
◈ END EXPEDITION LOGISTICS
└ Before long expeditions: load Ender Chest with 3-session supply
└ During combat: retrieve potions from Ender Chest between fights
└ After void death: Ender Chest is in a fixed location
Recovery Compass → find death site → retrieve dropped items
If items fell in void: at minimum your Ender Chest has a backup kit
└ Create Teleporter Network (Ch10/Ch17): teleporter stations
can be supplied via Ender Chest for Quantum Fluid top-ups
▸ The Ender Chest was invented by the same civilizations
that built the End Cities.
They needed a way to send supplies forward
without putting the supply carrier at risk.
The solution was physics: make the chest exist everywhere at once.
Elegant. Dangerous to lose. Worth building.
▶ Place an Ender Chest in your End base [check]
▶ Resupply mid-expedition from the Ender Chest [check]
◇ Sophisticated Backpacks upgrade: the Ender Chest upgrade
(if available) integrates Ender Chest access into your backpack.
Check JEI under sophisticated_backpacks:.
If present: install it in your main exploration backpack
for one-click cross-dimensional access.
